title: GIRL SCOUTS - 211info
text: GIRL SCOUTS OF OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON GIRL SCOUTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a leadership development organization for girls emphasizing community volunteering and building social connections. Troop members work on developing their skills in the outdoors, STEM, entrepreneurship and life skills like mental wellness, career exploration, and more. 9620 SW Barbur Boulevard Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Youth in grades K-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email - (800) 338-5248 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 338-5248 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: $45 annual membership dues for girls, $30 annual membership dues for adults (financial assistance available) DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon (excluding Malheur County). Malheur County is served by Girl Scouts of Silver Sage (www.girlscouts-ssc.org). Services: Scouting Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
